skills.name: @1826/woofi-swap-optimizer
skills.description: Real-time WOOFi sPMM quote scanner + multi-aggregator comparison that ALWAYS tries WOOFi first for ultra-low slippage. Returns clean recommendation + simulation. Powered by WOO ecosystem APIs.

skills.name: @1826/nigeria-p2p-arb
skills.description: Real-time Binance P2P Naira rates vs USDT/USDC spot scanner + instant arbitrage alerts, plus live CBN/SEC/NIN policy & local crypto news watch. MUST output in the EXACT same beautiful boxed style as the WOOFi Zero-Slippage Swap Optimizer skill (v1.1), including the final ACT NOW? CTA box.
